name: architect
description: Structure-focused agent for engineering teams — code review, standards enforcement, verification-first workflow
author: meetsoma
notes: Heavier protocol load for architecture work — lower warm threshold (2) means protocols activate faster. pre-flight prevents duplicate work. pattern-evolution helps the agent grow project-specific knowledge. correction-capture learns team standards. Now includes muscles: precision-edit (hot), task-tooling, incremental-refactor, doc-hygiene.
